sharc
Documentation développeur
GlobalParticleMapping.cc
1 #include "GlobalParticleMapping.h"
2 
3 #include <arcane/mesh/ParticleFamily.h>
4 
5 
6 GlobalParticleMapping::GlobalParticleMapping(ArcGeoSim::IMeshAccessorToolsMng* mng)
7 {
8  m_debug = false;
9 
10  m_acc = mng->getMeshAccessor();
11  m_mesh = m_acc->getMesh() ;
12  m_tools = mng->getMeshTools();
13 
14  OrthonormalBoundingBox bbox = m_acc->getBoundingBox();
15 
16  m_grid = mng->getRegularGrid();
17  m_x_min = bbox.getXMin();
18  m_x_max = bbox.getXMax();
19  m_y_min = bbox.getYMin();
20  m_y_max = bbox.getYMax();
21  m_z_min = bbox.getZMin();
22  m_z_max = bbox.getZMax();
23 
24  m_tab.resize(3);
25 
26  m_epsilon = math::pow(10., -15.) * (bbox.getXMax() - bbox.getXMin()) * (bbox.getYMax() - bbox.getYMin())
27  * (bbox.getZMax() - bbox.getZMin());
28 
29 }
30 
31 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
32 void GlobalParticleMapping::run(ParticleVectorView particle_list)
33 {
34  IItemFamily* myFam = m_mesh->findItemFamily(IK_Particle, "Particle", true);
35 
36  VariableParticleReal3 particle_coords_variable(VariableBuildInfo(m_mesh, "ParticleCoord", "Particle"));
37 
38  UniqueArray<Integer> result;
39 
40  ENUMERATE_PARTICLE(ipart,particle_list)
41  {
42  getAssociatedCells(particle_coords_variable[ipart], result);
43 
44  if (!result.empty())
45  {
46  myFam->toParticleFamily()->setParticleCell(*ipart, m_mesh->meshItemInternalList()->cells.item(result[0]));
47  }
48  else
49  {
50  Cell null_cell ;
51  myFam->toParticleFamily()->setParticleCell(*ipart,null_cell ) ;
52  }
53  if (m_debug)
54  {
55  const Particle & myPart = *ipart;
56 
57  m_trace_mng->info() << "Particle " << ipart->localId()<<" coord:"<<particle_coords_variable[ipart];
58  if (myPart.hasCell() && !result.empty())
59  {
60  m_trace_mng->info() << "\t(particle.cell=" << myPart.cell().localId() << ") result="<<result[0];
61  }
62  else
63  {
64  m_trace_mng->info() << "\t(particle.cell=VIDE)";
65  }
66  }
67 
68  if (m_debug)
69  {
70  m_trace_mng->info() << "\tassociated to cells " << result;
71  }
72  }
73 }
74 
75 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
76 void GlobalParticleMapping::getAssociatedCells(const Real3& center, UniqueArray<Integer>& list)
77 {
78  list.clear();
79 
80  bool to_add = false;
81 
82  Cell cell;
83 
84  // Regarde si le points est dans la boite englobante du maillage
85  if ((center.x < m_x_min) || (center.x > m_x_max) || (center.y < m_y_min)
86  || (center.y > m_y_max || (center.z < m_z_min) || (center.z > m_z_max)))
87  {
88  return;
89  }
90 
91  m_grid->getIJK(center, m_tab);
92 
93  Integer index = m_grid->getIJK(m_tab[0], m_tab[1], m_tab[2]);
94 
95  UniqueArray<Integer> m_ite;
96  m_grid->getElementsFromCell(index, m_ite);
97 
98  for (IntegerSharedArray::iterator target = m_ite.begin(); target != m_ite.end(); target++)
99  {
100  to_add = false;
101 
102  cell = m_mesh->meshItemInternalList()->cells.item(*target);
103 
104  // On regarde si le point est dans cette cellule
105  if(cell.isActive())
106  to_add = m_tools->isInCell(cell, center, m_epsilon);
107 
108  if (to_add)
109  {
110  list.add(*target);
111  }
112  }
113 }
114

116 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/

OrthonormalBoundingBox getBoundingBox(bool force_compute=false)

MeshTools::isInCell
bool isInCell(const Cell &my_cell, Real3 point, Real epsilon)
Check if the point is included in the cell.

OrthonormalBoundingBox

RegularGrid::getIJK
void getIJK(const Real3 &P, ArrayView< Integer > tab) const
Compute the coordinates of the cell containing a point P.

RegularGrid::getElementsFromCell
void getElementsFromCell(Integer i, UniqueArray< Integer > &it) const
Retrieve the different element indexes from a cell.
Definition: RegularGrid.cc:364
